en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: amaniaku si ama ina kaka ka sawvalay si kaka ka ababay yaelrelrenay.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: ku ama maelrenge ku ama kisace.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: ku ina kuladhane ku ina tarasulrasulraw.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: luitavanane ku ama wakacalrilrisiane lumakaurivariva naiyane.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Rukai language with us at home.
We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.
I like our family very much.
